reviews.review_title: Super SICK game! 3d realism is AMAZING!!
reviews.review_description: I really like this game! The controls are easy to maneuver the tank around and aiming with your head is super easy! I like the game play and the scenery! Wishing the developer would add more levels. A  sci-fi city, mountain'isc terrain, snow terrain, Washington DC terrain, ECT....lol. The 3d realism is AWESOME! I like games that make you feel you are inside the game! Get this game! You will love it!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! Reflex Unit 2 is also available which has improved graphics, gameplay and stage variety! Also supports cross platform multiplayer for iOS and Android versions.

reviews.review_description: I had this on my wishlist for a while too. And thought ya know what I'm just gonna try it. As others have said it's way better using a gamepad I use the Ipega android game pad and the game is more enjoyable and easier to palybusing one. Found this game cool fun and even the it's a simple concept it really works on the war top table theme game play. Levels are quite long too which I like. Bit tricky in places but yeah love the sound action and music. Weapons and graphics are cool. I didnt find the music too loud  everything is just right. Well worth paying for.

I had this in my wish list for awhile. I was waiting for it to go on sale. It never did. I wish I hadn’t waited. I love it. Lots of fun. Only drawback is the music is too loud. And even when you turn it off, it comes back on the menu screen.

Oculus go. At the control room, Cantor move the cursor. Does not track my head, or the oculus go controller. Tried an xbox controller, no luck. Have deleted and reinstalled once, no luck. I'll give 4 stars so it doesn't affect your rating, please help.

First off, this just came to the Rift and cross play is a thing. I just played a game on my Rift versus a buddy on my Gear VR. So that's really cool. The single player is good fun too. Based on how much I've played and how many stages there appear to be it looks like you could get a few hours out of it.
Just finished the game, while a bit short at 7 levels was a lot of fun!

First 5min were awesome then it overheated my note 5. First time out of 20 games this has happened to me.

Now it appears that the game is having issues with the gear vr controller. Movement used to be very precise and fast with the touchpad. Now if i move in one direction i have to lift my thumb off the pad before i can change directions. Can only drive in straight lines.

Update: 
Thanks for the reply. Switching graphics to med fixed overheating and gear vr controller problems. Weird place to put graphic options though. Pretty fun game.

developer_response.body: Quality settings can be set to low or med for older devices. These settings can be found to the right of the main control room. if you are having problems with the Gear VR Remote, please make sure you have fresh batteries installed and do not have other BT devices (e.g. other controllers) connected at the same time.

reviews.review_description:
Works great on S8 with Steel Series XL

I wish there were more levels and a bit different scenery BUT other than that this game is 5 stars easily

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! If you are using an S8, you can try increasing the visual quality with the hidden quality settings on the right hand sided of the control room. Default is High quality mode for S6 and S7 devices, but with S8 I think you can push to Highest setting for a higher rendering resolution.
